member.summary: Uploads report files to blob storage.
member.param: Map of relative blob path to HTML content.

member.summary: Reads donation report publishing settings from configuration.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportConfiguration.ReadOptions(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Loads report options for the current tenant configuration.

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportGenerationRequest
member.summary: Options for a single donation report generation run.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportGenerationRequest.Force
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to run even when DonationReport:Enabled is false.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportGenerationRequest.LocalOutputDirectory
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional local directory for development output (e.g. Web wwwroot/report).

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportGenerationRequest.BlobContainerNameOverride
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional blob container override (e.g. current tenant NormalizedName from HttpContext).

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportGenerationResult
member.summary: Outcome of a donation report generation run.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportGenerationResult.Succeeded
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether generation completed successfully.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportGenerationResult.Skipped
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the run was skipped (e.g. disabled in configuration).

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportGenerationResult.Message
member.summary: Gets or sets a human-readable status message.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportGenerationResult.PagesUploaded
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of pages uploaded to blob storage.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportGenerationResult.PagesWrittenLocally
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of pages written to local disk.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportGenerationResult.TotalPaidAmount
member.summary: Gets or sets total paid amount in the snapshot.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportGenerationResult.PaidDonationCount
member.summary: Gets or sets paid donation count in the snapshot.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportGenerationResult.GeneratedAtUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets when the report was generated (UTC).

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportGenerationService
member.summary: Builds donation report snapshots, renders HTML, and publishes to blob and/or local storage.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportGenerationService.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class for explicit dependency invocation (e.g. Azure Functions).
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportGenerationState
member.summary: Tracks whether a background donation report generation is in progress.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportGenerationState.IsRunning
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether generation is currently running.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportGenerationState.TryStart
member.summary: Attempts to mark generation as started.
member.returns: true if this call started the run; otherwise false.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportGenerationState.Complete
member.summary: Marks generation as finished.

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportHtmlGenerator
member.summary: Generates static HTML pages for donation analytics.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportHtmlGenerator.GenerateAllPages(BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportSnapshot,System.String)
member.summary: Builds all report pages from a snapshot.
member.returns: Relative path to HTML content map.

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportLocalPublisher
member.summary: Writes generated report files to a local directory (for development).

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportLocalPublisher.PublishToDirectory(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Writes report files to a directory.
member.param: Map of relative file path to content.

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportOptions
member.summary: Configuration for static donation report publishing.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportOptions.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether report generation is enabled for this tenant.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportOptions.BlobContainerName
member.summary: Gets or sets the tenant blob container name (defaults to tenant NormalizedName from configuration).

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportOptions.BlobPrefix
member.summary: Gets or sets blob prefix inside the container (default wwwroot/report/).

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportOptions.SiteTitle
member.summary: Gets or sets the public site title.

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportPaths
member.summary: Paths used when publishing donation reports to tenant static storage.

member.name: F:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportPaths.BlobPrefix
member.summary: Blob prefix under the tenant storage container (maps to /report/ on the site).

member.name: F:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportPaths.PublicPath
member.summary: Public URL path on the main site.

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.IDonationReportGenerationService
member.summary: Builds and publishes static donation analytics reports.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.IDonationReportGenerationService.GenerateAndPublishAsync(BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Reporting.DonationReportGenerationRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates HTML report pages and publishes them using tenant configuration.
Generates HTML report pages and publishes them (explicit dependencies for Azure Functions).

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to AA{0}/{1}.

member.summary: Cross-campaign comparison matrix for evolution charts.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignComparison.CampaignLabels
member.summary: Gets or sets campaign column labels (chronological).

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignComparison.FoodBankAmountSeries
member.summary: Gets or sets paid amount (€) per food bank across campaigns.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignComparison.ProductUnitSeries
member.summary: Gets or sets product units per product across campaigns.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignComparison.CampaignTotals
member.summary: Gets or sets total paid amount per campaign column.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignComparison.CampaignAverageDonations
member.summary: Gets or sets average paid donation (€) per campaign column.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignComparison.CampaignMedianDonations
member.summary: Gets or sets median paid donation (€) per campaign column.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignComparison.CampaignMaxDonations
member.summary: Gets or sets maximum paid donation (€) per campaign column.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignComparison.CampaignMinDonations
member.summary: Gets or sets minimum paid donation (€) per campaign column.

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignDetail
member.summary: Aggregated metrics for a single campaign (used by client-side filters).

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignDetail.CampaignKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the campaign key (stringified or ).

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignDetail.CampaignName
member.summary: Gets or sets the campaign display name.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignDetail.PeriodStart
member.summary: Gets or sets the earliest paid donation date in this campaign.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignDetail.PeriodEnd
member.summary: Gets or sets the latest donation date in this campaign.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignDetail.Summary
member.summary: Gets or sets headline KPIs for the campaign.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignDetail.FoodBanks
member.summary: Gets or sets per food bank metrics.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignDetail.Products
member.summary: Gets or sets per product metrics.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignDetail.Payments
member.summary: Gets or sets per payment method metrics.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignDetail.DailyTrend
member.summary: Gets or sets daily paid trend within the campaign.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignDetail.PaymentStatuses
member.summary: Gets or sets payment status funnel for the campaign.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignDetail.TemporalAnalysis
member.summary: Gets or sets time-of-day and weekday patterns for the campaign.

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignDetail.PendingCount
member.summary: Gets or sets pending donation count (for campaigns table).

member.name: P:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.ViewModel.DonationReport.DonationReportCampaignDetail.ConversionPercent
member.summary: Gets or sets payment conversion percent (for campaigns table).

member.summary: Gets or sets conversion rate (%).

member.summary: Gets or sets first dimension label (row).

member.summary: Gets or sets the reporting period end (inclusive).

member.summary: Gets or sets the active campaign label.

member.summary: Gets or sets headline KPIs.

member.summary: Gets or sets daily paid donation trend.

member.summary: Gets or sets per-campaign metrics (all campaigns, not only active).

member.summary: Gets or sets per food bank metrics for the active period.

member.summary: Gets or sets per product metrics for the active period.

member.summary: Gets or sets per payment type metrics for the active period.

member.summary: Gets or sets payment status funnel for the active period.

member.summary: Gets or sets food bank × product cross-tab (top combinations).

member.summary: Gets or sets campaign × payment type cross-tab.

member.summary: Gets or sets food bank × payment type cross-tab.

member.summary: Gets or sets client-side filter payload (campaign drill-down and evolution).

member.summary: Gets or sets time-of-day and day-of-week patterns for the active period.

member.summary: Payment status funnel row.

member.summary: Gets or sets status label.

member.summary: Gets or sets donation count.

member.summary: Gets or sets share of all donations in period (%).

member.summary: Headline KPI block.

member.summary: Gets or sets total paid amount (EUR).

member.summary: Gets or sets count of paid donations.

member.summary: Gets or sets count of donations awaiting payment.

member.summary: Gets or sets count of failed payment donations.

member.summary: Gets or sets average paid ticket (EUR).

member.summary: Gets or sets total product units donated (paid donations).

member.summary: Gets or sets estimated food value from catalogue prices (EUR).

member.summary: Gets or sets share of cash-only donations (%).

member.summary: Gets or sets payment conversion rate (% paid of all initiated).

member.summary: Gets or sets distinct food banks receiving donations.

member.summary: Gets or sets the largest single paid donation (EUR).

member.summary: Time-of-day and day-of-week donation patterns.

member.summary: Gets or sets the peak hour (0–23).

member.summary: Gets or sets the peak hour label.

member.summary: Gets or sets donation count at peak hour.

member.summary: Gets or sets the peak day of week.

member.summary: Gets or sets the peak day label.

member.summary: Gets or sets donation count on peak day.

member.summary: Gets or sets hourly distribution (24 buckets).

member.summary: Gets or sets weekday distribution (Monday–Sunday).

member.summary: Day-of-week aggregation for temporal analysis.

member.summary: Gets or sets the day of week.

member.summary: Gets or sets a localized day name.

member.summary: Gets or sets paid donation count on this weekday.

member.summary: Gets or sets paid amount on this weekday (EUR).
